mapping.a_element: quantum graphs (networks of bonds and vertices)

mapping.b_element: spectra of Schroedinger operators on graphs

mapping.a_element: periodic orbits in classical phase space for graphs
mapping.b_element: Kronig-Penney model correspondence with Jacobi matrices

mapping.a_element: trace formula for quantum spectrum in terms of periodic orbits
mapping.b_element: duality between Schroedinger operators and Jacobi matrices

brief_justification: While both papers study spectral properties of operators on graphs, Paper A focuses on the role of periodic orbits and chaotic dynamics in reproducing spectral statistics via a trace formula, whereas Paper B establishes a duality between Schroedinger operators and Jacobi matrices, extending a specific model correspondence. The underlying machinery—trace formulas vs. operator duality—differs fundamentally.
